query:
-- Gifts: weddings, corporate, occasions, schools
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","occasions","newborn"]' WHERE id = 1;   -- دزة الورود
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["occasions","weddings"]' WHERE id = 2;              -- بوكس رمضان
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","boxes"]' WHERE id = 3;                  -- بوكس الخضرة
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","shields"]' WHERE id = 4;               -- بوكسات البراند
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","occasions"]' WHERE id = 5;              -- هدية الورود المجففة
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["occasions","weddings"]' WHERE id = 6;              -- هدية الفطر

-- Shields: corporate, schools, occasions
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","schools","shields"]' WHERE id = 7;    -- درع التكريم الذهبي
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","shields"]' WHERE id = 8;              -- درع الكريستال
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","schools","shields"]' WHERE id = 9;    -- درع الخط العربي
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","shields"]' WHERE id = 10;             -- درع الشركات

-- Catering: catering, weddings, corporate
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","catering","corporate"]' WHERE id = 11; -- ستاند الكيترنج
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["catering","corporate","schools"]' WHERE id = 12;  -- بوث العيد الوطني
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","catering","newborn"]' WHERE id = 13;   -- طاولة الضيافة

-- Occasions
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["occasions","schools"]' WHERE id = 14;             -- تجهيزات قرقيعان
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["schools","occasions"]' WHERE id = 15;             -- باقة تخرج

-- Calligraphy
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","shields","occasions"]' WHERE id = 16; -- لوحة الخط
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["corporate","shields","weddings"]' WHERE id = 17;  -- نقش ليزر

-- Catering canvas
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["catering"]' WHERE id = 60001;

-- Dazza wood
UPDATE products SET occasionKeys = '["weddings","occasions"]' WHERE id = 30001;
